description:
Canonical PASS fixture validating Props A/B/C plus Part II Cases A/B/C across a representative spread of moduli.
Primary sources: (Nielsen, 1924) Nielsen generators of SL_2(Z); (Lang, 2002) Algebra ch. III, elementary-divisor orbit classification on local rings; (Wall, 1960) Pisano periodicity pi(p^k).

notes.8: p=2, k=3, Case A (inert): uniform pi(8)=12 on L_0
notes.9: p=3, k=2, Case A: uniform pi(9)=24 on L_0
notes.25: p=5, k=2, Case C (ramified): 5x100 + 5x20 on L_0
notes.27: p=3, k=3, Case A: uniform pi(27)=72 on L_0
notes.11: p=11, k=1, Case B (split): 1x10 + 2x5 + 10x10 on L_0
notes.13: p=13, k=1, Case A: uniform pi(13)=28 on L_0
notes.49: p=7, k=2, Case A: uniform pi(49)=112 on L_0
